name: com.52choujiang/xhs-insights
title: 小红书 MCP | Xiaohongshu MCP | XHS MCP | RedNote MCP
description: Read-only 小红书 MCP / Xiaohongshu MCP / XHS MCP / RedNote MCP for note search, note details, first-level comments, creator profiles, and creator note lists.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer API key from Social Media Data Assistant

tools.name: xhs_search_notes
tools.description: Search Xiaohongshu / 小红书 notes by keyword for research and discovery.

tools.name: xhs_get_note_detail_by_note_url
tools.description: Resolve a shared XHS link or share text into structured note details.

tools.name: xhs_get_note_detail_by_note_id
tools.description: Fetch structured note details when the caller already has a note ID.

tools.name: xhs_get_note_comments_by_note_id
tools.description: Fetch paginated first-level comments when the caller already has a note ID.

tools.name: xhs_get_note_comments_by_note_url
tools.description: Fetch paginated first-level comments directly from a shared note URL or share text.

tools.name: xhs_get_user_info_by_user_id
tools.description: Fetch creator profile data when the caller already has a user ID.

tools.name: xhs_get_user_info_by_profile_url
tools.description: Resolve a profile link or share text into creator profile data.

tools.name: xhs_get_user_posted_notes_by_user_id
tools.description: Fetch a paginated list of notes published by a creator when the caller already has a user ID.

tools.name: xhs_get_user_posted_notes_by_profile_url
tools.description: Fetch a paginated list of notes published by a creator from a profile link or share text.
